reviews.review_description: This is the best game ! Please give us updates with more levels?

It's a good game .. but I cannot proceed to the next level.. I'm stuck on the same first level.. after killing all the toys... So I just uninstalled and reinstalled.. works perfectly... love the game!!!

I bought this not realizing that you need to purchase another controller when I already have one. I saw that it said you can use the touch pad but when I did it wouldn't respond. So let me guess you made a game for the newest phone only? Either way I would like a refund and assistance with that please. I have had my vr for 2 years and I love it but these changes are making me lose my love for it. I am disappointed and I will be watching these games and of they continue to be like this my days of purchasing vr games is done. It's like cheating people who already have had the vr to Gove only special perks to someone who just bought the new controllers. Your games should be able to accessed regardless of the controller.

reviews.review_title: Can't download it anymore - fix it!
reviews.review_description:
I have 166 games and this 1 of about 40 I can no longer download. Still happy to sell them though.

Oculus, get your act together!  Other games with same issue are:

Gunjack

Anshar 2

Gunsight

updated

issue has been fixed thank you .

Fun game

I’ve only played this game once, but it was really quite fun.  I wish you could shoot by only hitting the trigger because I have physical limitations and I’m in agony today because I played this yesterday.
